name: agentify
description: Agentify: enterprise agentic system design skill. JSON-IR diagram renderers (architecture, workflow, sequence, dataflow, lifecycle).

scripts.test: npm run check:validators && node test/golden.mjs && node --test test/*.test.mjs
scripts.assets:readme: node scripts/rasterize-diagram.mjs examples/support-agent.html ../docs/assets/support-agent-architecture && node scripts/rasterize-diagram.mjs examples/support-agent-query.html ../docs/assets/support-agent-query && node scripts/export-standalone-svg.mjs examples/support-agent.html ../docs/assets/support-agent-architecture.svg && node scripts/export-standalone-svg.mjs examples/support-agent-query.html ../docs/assets/support-agent-query.svg
